title: 🔥 Fractal Flames (Scott Draves)
name: Fractal Flames (Scott Draves)
what_it_is: A method to render fractals with colored, layered translucency and glowing trails. Combines nonlinear functions + color gradients.
how_to_use: her body is made of fractal flame light—layered wisps of color moving like slow fire
the background pulses in shifting flame fractals—iridescent trails dancing in chaos
animation_behavior: Smoothly shifting trails, layered glowing pulses, color morph over time ---
